raw_text: francisco josé 28905 getafe (madrid) herrera luque @ +34 692 13 16 51 born in 01/16/83 in granada, spain manuel de falla, 20 francisco.herrera.luque@gmail.com linkedin: es.linkedin.com/in/franciscoherreraluque/ st higher education telecommunication engineering master degree (english language) from carlos iii university (madrid, spain) with specialization in communications planning and management. sep 09 - jun 10: stay at the budapest university of technology and economics (hungary) under the erasmus programme: - master thesis writing: feature subset selection using support-vector machines by averaging over probabilistic genotype data. - scholarship during the first semester. complementary education oct-dec 2012: jun 2012: jul 2010: jul 2009: nov 2007: mar 2006: jul 2004: workshop on business administration of technological companies. 100 hours, carlos iii university and industrial organization school-eoi. seminar: intelligent energy networks and their advantages for the final consumer. gas natural fenosa foundation. conference: homage to professor kailath. 20 hours, signal theory and communications department, carlos iii university. summer course: borders in information and communications processing. 20 hours, uciiim telefónica chair. course: learning to negotiate. 20 hours, service of professional advising and planning, carlos iii university. course on avionics: aircrafts, flight foundations, communications, aeronautical instrumentation, navigation, regulation, safety and security. 60 hours, carlos iii university. summer course: domotics: advanced services and technologies. 20 hours, telematic engineering department, carlos iii university. professional experience oct 11 - currently: feb 11 - sep 11: sep 10 - jan 11: assistant researcher in the telematics department of carlos iii university (full time): - participant in the price-gen project aimed at the development of a pilot in intelligent electricity networks (smart grid). founded by the spanish ministry of economy and competitiveness (ipt-2011-1507-920000) and leaded by iberdrola and gas natural fenosa. url: http://www.priceproject.es/. - performed tasks can be summarized in the development of studies and analysis on the suitable communications technologies and the design a communications network for an advanced measurement infrastructure (ami) deployment. - additional research activities in the field of wireless sensor networks and its application to wearable health-monitoring systems (e-health). (see publications). intern in deutsche telekom ag (berlin, germany) (full time): - participant in the bowlmap project developed by the seamless communications and internet network architectures groups. - research and development of a visual and real time monitorization and debugging tool for communication networks. (see publications). - accesible use case url: http://bowl.net.t-labs.tu-berlin.de/map/ cofounder of the ecc company (part time): - industrial instrumentation equipment certification services in the water & waste water sector. - responsible for business strategic planning, marketing and publicity, in-field instrumentation equipment testing and certification, and reports generation. - client portfolio composed of concessionary companies of the canal de isabel ii water distributor (monopoly regime in the region of madrid). oct 07 - ago 09: scholarship in the classroom workshop service of carlos iii university (part time): - advice and education of teaching staff in the use of the information and communications technologies and the e-/earning. - web design and development, contents layout and interactive tutorials development. 2002 - 2008: cofounder of the grupo enjoy company (both full and part time): - social events planning and management (up to 1000 attenders). - responsible for business strategic planning, marketing and publicity, relations with suppliers, recruiting and work groups leading. languages spanish: mother tongue. english: bilingual spoken and written. working experience in an international environment. publication of scientific papers and redaction of technical reports. erasmus programme stay in english language with master thesis writing. university master degree in english language. fce (first certificate of english) of cambridge university (year 2000). french: basic level. studied as second foreign language during four years in secondary school. german: basic level. studied while living in berlin (germany) during half year. publications a review on architectures and communications technologies for wearable health-monitoring systems. sensors (issn 1424-8220), in special issue on body sensor networks for healthcare and pervasive applications, november 2012. available at: http://www.mdpi.com/1424-8220/12/10/13907/pdf "bowlmap: network monitoring and debugging through measurement visualization", in 4th ieee intl. workshop on hot topics in mesh networking (ieee hotmesh), june 2012. available at: http://ieeexplore.ieee.org/stamp/stamp.jsp?arnumber=06263778 technical knowledge ooss: windows, linux, mac os. languages: java, c/c++, several assemblers (intel pentium 4, pic, motorola 68hc11 and 68000), shellscript, html, javascript, perl, python, xml, sql, vhdl, openlayers. tools: microsoft office, libre office, gnu (gcc+gdb+emacs), ns-2, latex, matlab, statgraphics, microwave office, labview, modelsim, max plus ii, quarkexpress, eclipse. other merits high school diploma with honor in both scientific-technical and bio-medical modalities. bronze medal in both the regional (region of madrid) and the national (spain) stages of the xiii chemistry national olympic games organized by the royal spanish society of chemistry and the national chemistry association of spain.
